class.name: Witch
class.description: Witches are stricken by magic so dark it imprints a lasting shadow upon their essence. Reshaping their curse into spells, they spin this darkness outward to hex creatures and command familiars through force of personality.

starting_equipment.items: Leather Armor, Sickle, 2 Daggers, Arcane Focus (orb), Explorer’s Pack, and 5 GP

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You use Charisma as your spellcasting ability and an Arcane Focus. You prepare a list of spells from the Witch spell list and regain slots on a Long Rest. You can choose Hexes when picking cantrips.

class_features.name: Witch’s Curse
class_features.description: Choose a curse: Burned (Fire resistance, Produce Flame), Drowned (Breathe underwater, Swim speed), Feral (Survival proficiency, AC 13 + Dex), Hideous (Intimidation proficiency, Frighten on Initiative), Hollow (Temp HP on kill), Infested (Beasts have disadvantage vs you, Swarm familiar), Loveless (Charmed immunity), Possessed (Extra prepared spells), Starving (No exhaustion from hunger, Poison resistance/advantage), Visions (Initiative bonus), or Whispers (60ft Telepathy).

class_features.name: Hexes
class_features.description: You learn two Hex cantrips. They do not count against your number of cantrips known.

class_features.name: Cackle
class_features.description: Bonus Action: Extend the duration of one of your Hexes by 1 round if the target is within range.

class_features.name: Familiar
class_features.description: You always have Find Familiar prepared. Your familiar gains bonus HP (2x level), uses your spell attack modifier, and adds your Proficiency Bonus to AC/saves/damage. It can attack once per turn as your action/bonus action.

class_features.name: Witch Subclass
class_features.description: You gain a Witch subclass of your choice, granting features at levels 3, 6, 10, and 14.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat for which you qualify. You gain this feature again at levels 8, 12, and 16.

class_features.name: Insidious Spell
class_features.description: Creatures failing saves against your Hexes have Disadvantage on saves against your Witch spells until your next turn, and vice versa.

class_features.name: Improved Familiar
class_features.description: Your familiar's attacks can deal Force damage. You gain more exotic familiar form options (Imp, Quasit, etc.).

class_features.name: Hastened Hex
class_features.description: Once per turn when you cast a Hex as a Magic action, you can cast a non-Hex action cantrip as part of the same casting.

class_features.name: Grand Hex
class_features.description: You learn one Grand Hex. You gain more at levels 13, 15, and 17.

class_features.name: Vengeful Curse
class_features.description: Reaction (when you or an ally within 60ft becomes Bloodied): Curse the attacker to have Disadvantage on D20 Tests until the end of your next turn. Once per Long Rest.

class_features.name: Epic Boon
class_features.description: You gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

class_features.name: Hexmaster
class_features.description: When you cast a Hex requiring a save, you can force one target to automatically fail. Uses equal to Charisma modifier per Long Rest (or spend a spell slot).

features.name: Black Magic Spells
features.description: You always have specific spells prepared, such as Exhume and Animate Dead.

features.name: Decay
features.description: You learn the Hex: Decay cantrip (1d6 Necrotic damage per turn, Con save).

features.name: Undeath Command
features.description: Command Undead as a bonus action. One Undead from Animate Dead can gain Witch Familiar benefits.

features.name: Life Tether
features.description: Reaction (when damaged): Transfer half damage to your Hex target. Restore use by spending a level 2+ slot.

features.name: Grim Sacrifice
features.description: Magic Action: Kill your familiar to deal 8d10 Necrotic damage in a 20ft emanation. Restore use by spending a level 6+ slot.

features.name: Blood Spells
features.description: You always have specific spells prepared, such as Acid Arrow and Vampiric Touch.

features.name: Blood Curse
features.description: You learn the Hex: Blood Curse cantrip (target drops to 0 HP if below a threshold).

features.name: Arcane Bloodletting
features.description: Take 5 Necrotic damage to cast an action spell as a Bonus Action. Uses equal to Charisma modifier.

features.name: Deathseeker
features.description: Detect wounded/invisible creatures within 60ft. Advantage on tracking damaged targets.

features.name: Hemomantic Recovery
features.description: Short Rest: Expend Hit Point Dice to recover level 1-5 spell slots.

features.name: Sanguine
features.description: When damaging your Hex target with a spell slot, take 5+ Necrotic damage to deal extra 1d8 Necrotic damage per 5 taken.

features.name: Green Magic Spells
features.description: You always have specific spells prepared, such as Barkskin and Plant Growth.

features.name: Elder Tongue
features.description: You can cast Speak with Animals without a spell slot.

features.name: Primal Ally
features.description: Your familiar's bonus HP increases to 3x your level.

features.name: Twin Familiar
features.description: Summon two identical familiars that share a HP pool but act on separate turns.

features.name: Vital Nourishment
features.description: Long Rest: Restore plant life and grant allies Temp HP and condition removal.

features.name: Sacrificial Familiar
features.description: Reaction: Command familiar to take an attack meant for you. Uses equal to Charisma modifier.

features.name: Purple Magic Spells
features.description: You always have specific spells prepared, such as Disguise Self and Major Image.

features.name: Hallucination
features.description: You learn the Hex: Hallucination cantrip (Reaction to give target Disadvantage on D20 Tests).

features.name: False Authority
features.description: Modify Disguise Self to appear as a figure of authority to observers.

features.name: Deceitful Transposition
features.description: Bonus Action: Disguise two creatures to look/sound like they swapped places. Uses equal to Charisma modifier.

features.name: Waking Nightmare
features.description: Force a creature failing against Hex: Hallucination to become Frenzied for 1 minute. Restore use by spending a level 2+ slot.

features.name: Red Magic Spells
features.description: You always have specific spells prepared, such as Burning Hands and Fireball.

features.name: Imperil
features.description: You learn the Hex: Imperil cantrip (strip or bypass damage resistances).

features.name: Convolute Energy
features.description: Change the damage type of an elemental effect within 60ft. Uses equal to Charisma modifier.

features.name: Invulnerability
features.description: Reaction: Reduce incoming damage by 50. Restore use by spending a level 4+ slot.

features.name: Elemental Annihilation
features.description: Expend an extra slot to deal maximum damage with an elemental Witch spell. Once per Long Rest.

features.name: Steel Spells
features.description: You always have specific spells prepared, such as Shield and Haste.

features.name: Martial Training
features.description: Gain proficiency with non-heavy Martial weapons, Medium armor, and Shields.

features.name: Soulsteel
features.description: Bonus Action: Absorb familiar into a melee weapon for extra 1d6 damage and use as a focus.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice per action; can replace one attack with an action cantrip.

features.name: Insidious Smite
features.description: Once per turn on hit, expend a slot for extra 1d8 damage per slot level.

features.name: Hexplate
features.description: Gain physical damage resistance against your Hex target.

features.name: Tea Spells
features.description: You always have specific spells prepared, such as Augury and Sanctuary.

features.name: Tasseography
features.description: Bonus Action: Roll a d20 to replace a future D20 Test within 60ft. Uses equal to Charisma modifier.

features.name: Tea Ceremony
features.description: Short/Long Rest: Brew tea for 6 allies to reduce Exhaustion by 1.

features.name: Shapes and Omens
features.description: Long Rest: Gain Heroic Inspiration by interpreting tea leaf shapes.

features.name: Herbal Remedy
features.description: Allies drinking tea gain: Temp HP, Poison resistance/save advantage, or Restoration.

features.name: As Foretold
features.description: Regain all Tasseography uses on Initiative.

features.name: Technicolor Spells
features.description: You always have specific spells prepared, such as Color Spray and Fly.

features.name: Musical Interlude
features.description: You learn the Hex: Musical Interlude cantrip (grant Temp HP in 30ft emanation).

features.name: Animal Friends
features.description: Gain Animal Handling proficiency with Charisma bonus. Can adopt a Beast as a 'Pocket Pet'.

features.name: Friendship Bracelet
features.description: Magic Action: Create bracelets (up to Charisma mod) that allow Help as a bonus action and targeting from range.

features.name: Positivity
features.description: Reaction: Gain AC bonus equal to number of nearby friendly creatures. Restore use by spending a level 2+ slot.

features.name: Redemption Arc
features.description: Reaction: Spare a dying enemy to make them Friendly and Unconscious (1 HP). Once per Long Rest.

features.name: White Magic Spells
features.description: You always have specific spells prepared, such as Cure Wounds and Revivify.

features.name: Remedy
features.description: Gain a pool of d6s (equal to level) to heal yourself or others as an action/bonus action.

features.name: Talisman of Protection
features.description: Craft a talisman that grants +d4 to all saving throws for the wearer.

features.name: Benevolent Surge
features.description: Reaction (when damaged): Heal target for 1d10 + Charisma. Restore use by spending a level 2+ slot.

features.name: Witch’s Gift
features.description: Restoring HP to a creature grants them +3 AC until the end of your next turn.
